allow: Bash(python3 -c "import fitz; doc=fitz.open\(''/Users/baljinder/StudioProjects/eveolved26-hackathon/Evolved - Toronto - Hack Intro.pdf''\); print\(f''Pages: {len\(doc\)}''\); [print\(f''--- Page {i+1} ---''\); print\(doc[i].get_text\(\)\) for i in range\(len\(doc\)\)]")
